characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion. Dark brown hair tied back with loose strands framing her face. Symmetrical, smooth facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Dark green long-sleeve turtleneck sweater. Small gold hoop earrings.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, and slightly robotic in its consistent perfection.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, fair complexion. Light brown hair tied back. Wearing round, wire-rimmed glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey zip-up hoodie over a lighter-colored shirt.
characters.demeanor: Eager, slightly hesitant during initial attempts, becoming excited and confident.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: चलो, आज English speaking की practice करते हैं। [Let's practice English speaking today.]
Character B says: हाँ, बिल्कुल! [Yes, absolutely!]
Character A says: इस phrase को बोलो: "Do you want to go?" [Say this phrase: "Do you want to go?"]
Character B says: Do you want to go? [Do you want to go?]
Character A says: इसे थोड़ा naturally बोलो, try "Jawannago" [Say it a bit more naturally, try "Jawannago"]
Character B says: Do you wanna go? [Do you wanna go?]
Character A says: अब इसे try करो: "Let me think about it" [Now try this: "Let me think about it"]
Character B says: Let me think about it. [Let me think about it.]
Character A says: Fluent English में हम कहते हैं: "Lemmee thinkaboudit" [In fluent English we say: "Lemmee thinkaboudit"]
Character B says: Lemme think about it. [Lemme think about it.]
Character B says: अरे वाह, ये तो आसान है! एक और। [Oh wow, this is easy! One more.]
Character A says: "What did you say?" ["What did you say?"]
Character B says: What did you say? [What did you say?]
Character A says: इसे जल्दी बोलने के लिए try करो: "Whadjasay" [To say it faster, try: "Whadjasay"]
Character B says: What did you say? [What did you say?]
Character B says: Amazing! मेरी fluency तो अभी से better हो रही है। मैं और कैसे सीख सकती हूँ? [Amazing! My fluency is already getting better. How can I learn more?]
Character A says: बस Supernova app download करो। हम रोज़ practice करेंगे, और तुम confidently English बोलने लगोगी। [Just download the Supernova app. We'll practice daily, and you'll start speaking English confidently.]
Character B says: Perfect! मैं अभी download करती हूँ। [Perfect! I'm downloading it right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the user with an interactive, split-screen roleplay demonstrating real-time AI pronunciation feedback.
- Builds confidence by showing the learner easily progressing from formal, rigid English to natural, conversational fluency.
- Culminates in a clear, encouraging call-to-action positioning the app as a daily practice companion.
